props.name: icon
props.comment: Custom icon node. Defaults to the Settings icon.

props.name: label
props.comment: Translation key for the tooltip and aria-label.

props.name: ref
props.comment:
Allows getting a ref to the component instance.
Once the component unmounts, React will set `ref.current` to `null`
(or call the ref with `null` if you passed a callback ref).
